title: Integration test: 2-node Renode RX via DIO1 interrupt
description: End-to-end test proving push-based RX works: (1) Start lichen-sim in BARRIER_SYNC mode, (2) Launch 2 Renode instances with T-Echo firmware, (3) Node A transmits a frame, (4) Assert: sim time advances past TX airtime, (5) Assert: Node B DIO1 fires (check Renode log or GPIO trace), (6) Assert: Node B firmware logs received frame, (7) Assert: sim metrics show exactly 1 rx_success for the tx_id. Can be a pytest that orchestrates Renode headlessly or a manual test script with clear pass/fail criteria.
acceptance_criteria: Test script exists and passes; demonstrates interrupt-driven RX path works end-to-end
close_reason: Created 8 integration tests: 6 Python callback-based RX tests + 2 Renode subprocess tests, all pass
